scripts.build: overpy compile -i src/main.opy --root src -o workshop.ow -l zh-CN
scripts.build:release: mkdir -p build && overpy compile -i src/main.opy --root src -l zh-CN -o build/main.ow
scripts.build:aram: mkdir -p build && overpy compile -i src/aramMain.opy --root src -l zh-CN -o build/aram.ow
